mapper.select: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(repair_quantity), 0) FROM equipment_repair WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND repair_status = 1
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(repair_quantity), 0) FROM equipment_repair WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND repair_status = 2
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(repair_quantity), 0) FROM equipment_repair WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND repair_status = 1 AND audit_status = 1
SELECT COUNT(*) > 0 FROM equipment_repair WHERE equipment_id = #{equipmentId} AND audit_status = 0
